summary: Four selected Alpha 0.1 roles now have original front and side_inward runtime portraits in the existing RolePortraitCatalog manifest.

integration_updates_required.reason: 深海菌毯使团 is no longer a pending portrait; use another still-pending role as the fallback sentinel.
The old Bench uses 深海菌毯使团 as its missing-art example; select another pending role without changing Skin behavior.
The manifest parity oracle must move from rendered=8/pending=16 to rendered=12/pending=12.
Regenerate the shared all-rendered-role sheet after integration; this branch provides a scoped Alpha sheet and does not overwrite the shared historical sheet.

runtime_note: RolePortraitCatalog already reads the updated manifest and accepts these res://assets/art/role_portraits/temporary paths. No production UI or Skin edit is required.
